//: Composite indexes required by backend Firestore queries. Single-field equality/order queries (admin user search by email/phone, activities orderBy createdAt) use Firestore's automatic single-field indexes and are not listed here. Deploy with: firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes

indexes.//: RewardRedemptionService §3.4 one-pending-per-user check: redeem_codes where uid == caller AND status == 'pending'.
ExpiredRedemptionJob §3.1 sweep: redeem_codes where status == 'pending' AND expiresAt < now.
